tools.name: query
tools.description: Executes a read-only SQL query using parameterized statements to prevent injection. Returns results as JSON rows.

parameters.name: params
parameters.description: Array of parameter values for the placeholders

tools.name: list_tables
tools.description: Lists all tables in the connected database schema.

tools.name: describe_table
tools.description: Returns the column names, types, and constraints for the specified table.
